exploration_notes: Traced the complete HTTP/1.1 request path through Envoy: TcpListenerImpl::onSocketEvent() accepts the TCP connection → ActiveTcpListener::onAccept() runs listener filters → FilterChainManagerImpl::findFilterChain() selects the network filter chain via multi-dimensional trie → FilterChainUtility::buildFilterChain() installs HCM as a read filter → ConnectionImpl::onReadReady() delivers bytes → ConnectionManagerImpl::onData() creates codec and dispatches → codec parses HTTP creating ActiveStream →
